name: Chicken Cacciatore
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix stewed tomatoes and tomato sauce together.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients to the mixture.
3. Combine everything well.
4. Place the chicken in a crockpot.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
6. Cook on HIGH until it begins to boil.
7. Reduce the heat to LOW and let it simmer for the day.
8. Serve over pasta or rice.
